sections.paragraph:
Σέργιος, ου, ὁ Sergius, name of a Roman gens (in its Gk. form in Diod S 12, 24, 1; 12, 43, 1; 14, 19, 1; SIG 646, 16; pap): Σέργιος Παῦλος ἀνθύπατος proconsul Sergius Paulus Ac 13:7. Attempts to confirm the identity of this official through ins have not proved convincing (Hemer, Acts 109 n. 17; 166f n. 16). On the principal documents (IGR III, 930, but without the name Sergius, s. HDessau, ZNW 2, 1901, 83 n. 3; Groag, Pauly-W. VI [1909] 1781; for improved rdg. TMitford, ANRW II/7/2 [1980], 1301–4. SEG XX, 302, 10f Κ]οΐντου Σεργ|[ίου Παύλου ἀνθυπάτου–-], which is placed in a restored rdg. under the reign of Gaius [Caligula], not Claudius, by Mitford p. 1300 n. 54 and 1330 n. 195. A terminal stone in the city of Rome CIL VI 31545 [=ILS 5926; s. Mommsen, ZNW 2, 1901, p. 83, 3] w. full name ‘L. Sergius Paullus’ but without ref. to Cyprus; two inscriptions fr. Pisidian Antioch [Ramsay, Bearing 150; 153f; GCheesman, JRS 3, 1913, 262]) s. Hemer above and Boffo, Iscrizioni 242–46.—TZahn, NKZ 15, 1904, 23–41; 189–200; Ramsay, Bearing 150–72; Cheesman, loc. cit. 253–66; AWikenhauser, Die AG 1921, 338–41; Kl. Pauly V 137; Haenchen p. 77 (Eng. tr. 64); DBS XII 693–99.—LGPN I. M-M.

Gk. Gk. = Greek

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

ins Ins, ins = Inscription, Inschrift, inscription(s). Without a period, esp. in lists, as at the beginning of entries; the capitalized form is used in titles. In conjunction with literary works this abbr. refers to the title or description of contents.

Hemer, Acts Hemer, Acts = CH., The Book of Acts in the Setting of Hellenistic History—List 6

IGR IGR = Inscriptiones Graecae ad res Romanas pertinentes—List 3

ZNW ZNW = Zeitschrift für die ntl. Wissenschaft—List 6

Pauly-W Pauly-W = AP./GW., Real-Encyclopädie der klassischen Altertumswissenschaft—List 6

rdg. rdg. = reading(s)

ANRW ANRW = Aufstieg und Niedergang der Römischen Welt—List 6

SEG SEG = Supplementum Epigraphicum Graecum—List 3

CIL CIL = Corpus Inscriptionum Latinarum—List 3

ILS ILS = Inscriptiones Latinae Selectae—List 3

  1. L. = KLachmann, editor of the Greek NT (1842–50)—List 1, beg.

ref. ref. = reference(s)

  1. fr. = from

Ramsay, Bearing Ramsay, Bearing = The Bearing of Recent Discovery on the Trustworthiness of the NT

JRS JRS = Journal of Roman Studies—List 6

Boffo, Iscrizioni Boffo, Iscrizioni = LB., Iscrizioni greche e latine—List 3

NKZ NKZ = Neue Kirchliche Zeitschrift—List 6

loc. cit loc. cit = loco citato (in the place already cited)

AG AG = Apostelgeschichte (in German titles relating to Acts)

Kl. Pauly Kl. Pauly = Der Kleine Pauly: Lexikon der Antike—List 6

Haenchen Haenchen = EH., Commentary on Acts—List 6

Eng. tr. Eng. tr. = English translation

DBS DBS = Dictionnaire de la Bible, Supplements—List 6

LGPN LGPN = A Lexicon of Greek Personal Names—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 919
